# Sample description table

**Data field**

An array of sample descriptions.

## Overview

While the exact format of the sample description varies by media type, the first four fields of every sample description are the same.







These four fields may be followed by additional data specific to the media type and data format. See [doc://com.apple.qtff/documentation/QuickTime-File-Format/Media_data_atom_types] for additional details regarding specific media types and media formats.

## Data fields

- **Size**: A 32-bit integer that specifies the number of bytes in this sample description atom.
- **Type**: A 32-bit integer that identifies the atom type.
- **Version**: A 1-byte specification of the version of this sample description atom.
- **Flags**: A 3-byte space for sample description flags.
- **Number of entries**: A 32-bit integer containing the number of sample descriptions that follow.
